commands.bot.status: Use bot on or bot off.
commands.botlist.empty: No bot ids are currently ignored.
commands.bind.invalid: That binding token is invalid, expired, or already used.
commands.bind.private_only: Use this command in a private chat with the bot.
commands.bind.unavailable: Keeper binding is not available on this server.
commands.audio.empty: No audio has been uploaded in this room yet. Use /audio <path> in the TUI.
commands.audio.set_usage: Usage: .audio set <audio> title=<title> license=<license> source=<source> tags=a,b
commands.audio.usage: Usage: .audio list | .audio set <audio> title=<title> license=<license> source=<source> tags=a,b
commands.audio.voice_busy: This Discord server is already playing audio for another room.
commands.avatar.denied: Only the keeper may set an avatar for an NPC or companion.
commands.avatar.error.avatar_no_characte: Create or select a character before setting an avatar.
commands.avatar.error.imagegen_bad_promp: Image generation skipped: the description was empty.
commands.avatar.error.imagegen_bad_respo: Image provider returned an invalid response.
commands.avatar.error.imagegen_missing_k: Image generation is missing an API key.
commands.avatar.media_disabled: Media uploads are disabled in this room.
commands.avatar.rate_limited: Image generation limit reached for this room. Try again later.
commands.help.audio: List or edit the room audio library.
commands.help.avatar: Set or generate your character avatar.
commands.help.bind: Bind this chat identity as a room keeper.
commands.help.check: Roll a skill or ability check.
commands.help.report: Export the session report to keep and review.
commands.help.room: Open, link, or leave a shared cross-platform room.
commands.help.sheet: Show or edit the active sheet.
commands.help.skill: List, enable, or disable per-room KP skills.
commands.help.unbind: Remove this chat identity's keeper binding.
commands.module.help: Import a module file from the server filesystem and start module analysis.
commands.module.progress.embed: ② Embedding into the search index
commands.module.progress.analyze: ③ Analyzing the module (a long module can take 10+ minutes — please wait)
commands.module.progress.done_fallback: ⑤ Done in degraded mode — re-import the module to retry full analysis
commands.report.no_session: No session recording found to export yet.
commands.sheet.finalized: Vitals (HP/MP/SAN) recalculated to full for the current characteristics: {name}
commands.skill.status: KP skills enabled for this room: {items}
commands.skill.denied: Only the keeper may manage KP skills.
commands.unbind.none: This chat identity is not bound as a keeper.
